title: Add report selector aliases and recovery guidance
goal: Implement #507 by making plausible report selector mistakes recover cheaply.
Support narrow aliases for common active-work and external-work queries.
Improve unknown-section errors with compact recovery routes instead of only listing sections.
non_goals: Do not add a new report section to the default router.
Do not move canonical active-work authority out of summary/effective_authority.
Do not add a new command or broaden startup/report output.

intent.outcome: agents can recover from common report selector guesses without broad rereads
intent.constraints: aliases only; canonical sections remain stable; no new first-line surface
intent.latitude: may add alias resolver, compact error guidance, and focused CLI tests
intent.escalation: stop if aliasing would change report default shape or duplicate summary semantics

execution.next_step: archive plan, close #507, and continue the next workflow-friction-polish slice

invariants: aliases should identify their resolved canonical source in compact output

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: remove small package-use friction discovered during dogfooding

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #507 closes, continue #515 or refreshed higher-priority issue

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No new first-line report payload, no command addition, preserve canonical report sections.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: alias names, selector metadata shape, and test placement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: supporting the alias would require moving active-work semantics out of existing summary/report surfaces.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: reporting support, report CLI tests, active plan/state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: before changing report payload construction in cli.py
execution_bounds.stop before touching: default report profile shape or startup guidance

stop_conditions.stop when: alias support would make current_work an independent canonical report doctrine
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: existing report selector contract conflicts with alias metadata

active_milestone.scope: report selector aliases and unknown-section recovery guidance

immediate_next_action: Add selector alias resolution and tests for current_work/current_external_work recovery.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
completion_criteria: report --section current_work and active_work recover to compact current-work output.
report --section current_external_work or external_work recovers to external_work_reconciliation.
unknown section errors recommend compact recovery routes.

execution_run.what happened: Added report section alias resolution for active/current work and external-work guesses, plus compact unknown-section recovery guidance.
execution_run.scope touched: reporting support, focused CLI tests, active plan/state
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "report_section_selector"; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; dogfooded report --section current_work/current_external_work and unknown-section recovery.
execution_run.result for continuation: #507 complete; workflow-friction-polish continues with #515 or refreshed higher-priority work.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no default report expansion or new first-line surface
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; common selector guesses now recover cheaply
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact package surfaces and planning closeout workflow
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: keep parent lane open for remaining workflow-friction-polish issues

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused and full workspace CLI tests passed, ruff passed, planning surfaces/doctor passed, proof selector chose the same lanes, and dogfooded alias/error commands behaved as intended.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: #507: add aliases or guidance for common report selectors.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #507 added report selector aliases and compact unknown-section recovery guidance; focused CLI tests and proof-selected commands passed.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #515 and the rest of workflow-friction-polish remain open.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: recover from plausible guesses through existing selectors rather than adding doctrine
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this reduce selector guesswork without growing default output?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: Bounded #507 slice complete; parent workflow-friction-polish lane remains open.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: tests/test_workspace_cli.py, ruff, planning surfaces, proof-selected doctor, and dogfooded alias commands passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #507 if common active/external-work report selectors fail without compact recovery guidance.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Common report-selector guesses should recover through aliases or compact guidance, not larger default payloads.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package is cheaper to use when plausible selector names work or fail with narrow next actions.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: when report sections, aliases, or selector guidance changes

execution_summary.outcome delivered: report selector aliases and compact recovery guidance added
execution_summary.validation confirmed: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning checks, doctor, and dogfooded commands passed
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): none; tests and reporting code are sufficient durable residue

signals found: Dogfooding confirmed common report selector guesses failed before this slice.
signals fixed: #507 fixed by alias resolution and compact unknown-section guidance.
signals dismissed: No new shipped feature needed; existing report selector machinery was enough.
